summary: Classified the five open PRs in this live inventory shard independently. No shared canonical was selected, no security-sensitive refs were detected, and no close/merge/fix actions are allowed by the job. Three PRs should stay open with concrete proof/review blockers; two PRs need maintainer judgment because they are focused fixes with green/proof-sufficient evidence or unresolved maintainer-review gates.
